name: superzej-acp-extension
description: superzej's pi package: the ACP bridge extension (superzej-acp.ts) + the superzej-house skill. pi (>=0.80) bundles @earendil-works/pi-coding-agent and resolves it for the extension at load time, so NO install is required to run; the dependency is declared only for editor type-checking. By default the extension is additive — it observes via session/update, routes the model via the proxy, and exposes superzej's house tools via MCP-over-ACP, leaving pi's built-in tools in-process. Under SUPERZEJ_BOUNCER=1 it also overrides bash/read/edit/write to route over ACP so superzej runs them in a sealed sandbox behind an allow/deny gate, and (when SUPERZEJ_PROXY_UNIX is set) routes the model proxy over a bind-mounted unix socket for a full network seal.
